DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce.description: Delete a saved brand protection domain query from the account_queries table. This operation will remove the query from the durable object database. Returns 404 if the query ID doesn't exist.
Delete a user-defined takedown letter template. System templates cannot be deleted.
Delete a saved brand protection logo query. Returns 404 if the query ID doesn't exist.
Delete a takedown notice and all associated letters. PDFs are also removed from storage.
Delete a specific takedown letter and its associated PDF from storage.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Get paginated list of domain matches for one or more brand protection queries. When multiple query_ids are provided (comma-separated), matches are deduplicated across queries and each match includes a match_details array with per-match query metadata and individual dismissed state.

schema.description: Query ID or comma-separated list of Query IDs. When multiple IDs are provided, matches are deduplicated across queries and each match includes a match_details array with per-match query metadata and dismissed state.
Filter matches by domain name (substring match)
Column to sort by. Options: 'domain', 'first_seen', or 'registrar'

dismissed.description: Whether the match is dismissed. Only present for single-query requests. For multi-query requests, use the dismissed field in each match_details entry.

match_details.description: Per-match detail objects with query metadata and individual dismissed state. Only present when multiple query_ids are requested.

dismissed.description: Individual dismissed state for this specific match.

query_tag.description: Tag associated with the query, if one exists.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Get all saved brand protection queries for an account

schema.description: Optional page number for paginated list requests. Defaults to 1 when only per_page is supplied. Omit page and per_page to preserve the legacy full-list response.
Optional number of queries per page for paginated list requests. Defaults to 100 when only page is supplied. Maximum 100. Omit page and per_page to preserve the legacy full-list response.

result_info.description: Present on paginated list responses when page or per_page is supplied.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: List user-defined takedown letter templates. System example templates are available via the /templates/examples endpoint.
Get a specific user-defined takedown letter template by ID. System example templates are available via the /templates/examples endpoint.
List system-provided example templates that can be used as starting points when creating custom templates. These templates cannot be used directly for letter generation.
Get paginated list of logo matches for a specific brand protection logo query

schema.description: Column to sort by. Options: 'matchedAt', 'domain', 'similarityScore', or 'registrar'

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Get all saved brand protection logo queries for an account. Optionally specify id to get a single query. Set download=true to include base64-encoded image data.

parameters.description: Optional query ID to retrieve a specific logo query
parameters.name: id

schema.description: Optional query ID to retrieve a specific logo query

parameters.description: If true, include base64-encoded image data in the response
parameters.name: download

schema.description: If true, include base64-encoded image data in the response

content_type.description: MIME type of the image (only present when download=true)

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image data (only present when download=true)

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: List all takedown notices for the account.
Get a specific takedown notice by ID.
List all letters for a specific takedown notice.
Get a specific takedown letter by ID, including the rendered text.
Download the PDF for a stored takedown letter. If no PDF exists yet, it is generated from the stored letter text and cached for future downloads.
Get the total number of saved brand protection queries (domain + logo) for an account

PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-.description: Update a saved brand protection domain query with string match patterns

search_lookback.description: If true, search recent domain lookback entries for matches

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Create a new saved brand protection query with string match patterns

search_lookback.description: If true, search recent domain lookback entries for matches

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Generate a takedown letter from a template. Returns V4 JSON for text format or a PDF binary for pdf format.

200.description: Letter generated successfully. When format=text, returns V4 JSON with { result: { letter: string } }. When format=pdf, returns binary with Content-Type: application/pdf.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Create a new user-defined takedown letter template
Create a new saved brand protection logo query for visual similarity matching

image_data.description: Base64 encoded image data. Can include data URI prefix (e.g., 'data:image/png;base64,...') or just the base64 string.

search_lookback.description: If true, search historic scanned images for matches above the similarity threshold

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity score (0-1) required for visual matches

tag.description: Unique identifier for the logo query

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Submit an image and find the n closest matches from the scanned images index without creating any match records. Returns similarity scores and metadata for each match.

parameters.description: Include scanned images without domain metadata (historic data). Default: false (only show images with domain)
parameters.name: showHistoric

schema.description: Include scanned images without domain metadata (historic data). Default: false (only show images with domain)

parameters.description: If true, include base64-encoded image data in the response
parameters.name: download

schema.description: If true, include base64-encoded image data in the response

image_data.description: Base64 encoded image data. Can include data URI prefix (e.g., 'data:image/png;base64,...') or just the base64 string.

score_threshold.description: Minimum similarity score threshold for matches (0-1, default: 0)

top_k.description: Number of closest matches to return (1-100, default: 10)

content_type.description: MIME type of the image (only present when download=true)

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image data (only present when download=true)

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Create a new takedown notice for a domain suspected of trademark infringement.

409.description: A takedown notice already exists for this domain

POST /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-o.description: Generate a takedown letter for a notice and persist the rendered text. The PDF is generated lazily on download.

Bulk lookup of takedown notices by domain names. Returns an array of { domain, queryId, notice } entries (notice is null when no match exists). Supports optional queryId or queryIds to scope lookups per query. Uses POST to avoid URL length limits when looking up many domains. This endpoint is read-only. Domains are normalized (trimmed, lowercased) and deduplicated.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Update a user-defined takedown letter template. System templates cannot be modified.
Update a takedown notice (e.g. change status to sent, resolved, etc.).

409.description: A takedown notice already exists for the target domain
